questionHtml: Outline the major technical problem affecting the direct use of vegetable oils as fuels in internal combustion engines and the chemical conversion that has overcome this.
markschemeHtml:
viscosity «of vegetable oils is too high»

 

transesterification

OR

«conversion into» alkyl/methyl/ethyl esters

 

[2 marks]

meta.title: Outline the major technical problem affecting the direct use of vegetable oils as fuels in internal combustion engines and the chemical conversion that has overcome this.
